title: poa clivicola
intro: Poa clivicola, also known as Mountain Bluegrass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Poa clivicola are said to help in reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive issues, thereby providing relief from various health problems. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as remedies for its mentioned health benefits.
